title: Boat Rental in Sabah Borneo: 2026 Costs & Tips
html:
Planning a yacht charter in Sabah Borneo in 2026 offers access to some of the most biodiverse marine habitats on earth, with departures from the Sutera Harbour Marina in Kota Kinabalu and prices for a half-day motorboat rental starting around 150 EUR. BoatHire24 connects you with verified boat owners across the region.

Where to set off in Sabah Borneo

Sabah's west coast offers the most sheltered and scenic boating grounds. The main departure points include Sutera Harbour Marina in Kota Kinabalu, the purpose-built marina at Shangri-La's Rasa Ria Resort in Tuaran, and the small jetty at Tanjung Aru. Further north, the Kudat Marina provides access to the tip of Borneo, while on the east coast, Semporna is the gateway to the Semporna Archipelago including Sipadan Island. Many charters also depart from the Tunku Abdul Rahman Marine Park jetty just off Kota Kinabalu, a 15-minute ride to the park's five islands.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Sabah Borneo?

Rental prices vary by boat type and duration, starting from around 60 EUR for a shared tour to over 2,000 EUR for a private crewed yacht per day. BoatHire24's platform allows you to compare verified listings and book direct with owners. For a detailed overview of available boats and prices, browse the yacht charter Sabah Borneo page which lists everything from small motorboats to luxury yachts.

Which boat to rent

  1. Motorboat (e.g., Olympic 490), Ideal for fast island hopping to the Tunku Abdul Rahman Marine Park; seats 6; from 150 EUR for a half-day. For full details on this model, see the Olympic 490 listing.
  2. Catamaran (e.g., Lagoon 450), Stable for groups and families; sleeps 8-12; full-day charter from 600 EUR.
  3. Sailing Yacht (e.g., Sun Odyssey 349), Perfect for a relaxed sail to Gaya Island; capacity 8; from 400 EUR for a day sail.
  4. Luxury Motor Yacht (e.g., Azimut 55), Crewed with gourmet catering; accommodates 10; from 1,500 EUR per day.
  5. RIB (Rigid Inflatable Boat), Fast and nimble for diving trips to Sipadan; seats 6-8; from 250 EUR for a full day.

Costs at a glance

  • Shared snorkel tour: from 60 EUR per person (half-day).
  • Small motorboat half-day: from 150 EUR (up to 6 guests).
  • Catamaran full-day charter: from 600 EUR (sleeps 8-12).
  • Private crewed yacht (including skipper, fuel, lunch): from 1,200 EUR per day.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Sabah Borneo?

For bareboat charter (self-drive) a valid ICC or equivalent is generally required, but skippered charters are available without a licence. Always confirm exact requirements with the operator before booking, as local regulations may vary. The best season for boating is from March to October, when the north-east monsoon brings calm seas and the prevailing wind is light from the south-west.

To avoid the afternoon squalls common between May and August, plan your return to port by 14:00 and keep a lookout for sudden wind shifts near the islands.

At a glance

  • Price range: 60 to 2,500 EUR per day
  • Peak months: April to September
  • Typical trip length: 4 to 8 hours
  • Max capacity: 6 to 12 guests
  • Currency: EUR (prices often quoted in MYR locally)
  • Distance: The Tunku Abdul Rahman Marine Park is 3 nautical miles from Kota Kinabalu.

Questions about boat rental in Sabah Borneo

What is the best month for a yacht charter in Sabah Borneo?

The best time is between March and October, when seas are calmest and rainfall is lower, particularly around the Semporna Archipelago.

Can I rent a boat in Sabah without a skipper?

Yes, if you hold a recognised International Certificate of Competence (ICC) or equivalent, but most visitors choose a skippered charter for convenience and local knowledge.

How long does it take to sail from Kota Kinabalu to Gaya Island?

A motorboat from Sutera Harbour Marina to Gaya Island takes about 20 minutes, covering roughly 4 nautical miles.

What size boat is suitable for a family of five?

A 30-35 foot motor yacht or catamaran comfortably accommodates a family of five for a day trip, with prices starting around 300 EUR.

Whether you are renting a boat for a day or a week, BoatHire24 offers a secure booking platform with thousands of verified listings worldwide. If you own a boat in Sabah, you can also list your boat and earn extra income by welcoming travellers aboard.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Sabah Borneo and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
